Hardware Component File

ADAS_ECU_C1AHS_V1_1

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference ADAS_ECU_C1AHS_V1_1_20190524T180555.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 2000000
Send ID 7C3
Receive ID 7C9
Functional Addr 11
Functional Name ADAS-Sub

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "Hitachi",
    "soft": "SW2.0_0000002B",
    "version": "SW2.0"
